data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: The visually appealing interface encourages usage and engagement.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design language with smooth animations across platforms.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The design minimizes decision time by simplifying layout and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive UI with personalized content recommendations reduces cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Elements are placed strategically for ease of use, enhancing navigation efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Focus on position and size of interactive elements to reduce user effort.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Adheres to web standards to meet user expectations and ease navigation.
data.technical_spec: UI consistency across devices with familiar control patterns.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focus on key features that drive the most user engagement.
data.technical_spec: Prioritization of discovery and playback functionalities.
